key_questions: 1. Did Iran FORMALLY confirm ceasefire extension before Monday open? (In-principle agreed Fri night — formal deal = RISK-ON confirmed. Extension likely ~Apr 22 + 2 weeks = May 5)
2. BoJ Apr 27-28 (confirmed): hold at 0.75% expected (82% odds). USDJPY setup window Mon-Fri before BoJ. No binary this weekend.
setup_priority: 1. AUDUSD: Buy pullback to 0.7085 — BEST setup (Conv 4, R:R ~2-3:1). Entry ONLY if Iran extension confirmed.
2. USDJPY: Sell at 160 — BoJ is Apr 27-28 (not this weekend). More time for drift. Setup window: Mon-Fri next week before BoJ. Reduce size near BoJ date.
3. USDCAD: Sell bounce to 1.3820 — Entry any time (less Iran/BoJ sensitive). DXY weakness play.
4. EURUSD: RESET — needs new structure above 1.1811. Watch for clean breakout with volume Monday.
monday_prep.monday_open_plan: Wait 30-60 min after Sydney/Tokyo open for gap to stabilize. Check AUDUSD first — if risk-on gap up, wait for the 0.7085 pullback before entering. Size down first trade (0.5% risk) until direction confirmed.

regime_note: WEEKEND SCAN 22:45 IST: IN-PRINCIPLE CEASEFIRE EXTENSION AGREED. Both sides gave 'in principle' agreement to extend ceasefire ~2 more weeks past Apr 22. No formal deal yet — US hasn't officially signed. Round 2 talks expected in coming days in Pakistan. Trump says war 'very close to over'. Sticking points: nuclear program, Hormuz, war compensation. WTI closed $90.79 (confirmed). Gold $4,878 holding near ATH. AUDUSD long thesis STRENGTHENED — extension likely = risk-on bias into Monday. But formal confirmation still needed before entry. EURUSD fakeout setup reset pending. BoJ Apr 27-28 confirmed. No change to setups — no entries until Monday open confirmation.

watchlist.entry_plan: Long at ~0.7085 on pullback to broken resistance (now support)
watchlist.thesis: TOP PICK (Conv 4). Golden Cross on 4H. De-escalation = risk-on = AUD is the quintessential risk currency. DXY at 98.13 (7 straight down sessions). 0.7000 flipped from resistance to support. Best R:R of all setups (~2:1 to 3:1).

watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~160.00-160.10 anticipating BoJ/MoF intervention (Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan 2026, 191-pip crash in 5 min)
watchlist.size_plan: Calculate via risk_guard — keep small given binary risk
watchlist.thesis: ASYMMETRIC TRADE (Conv 3). Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan — 160 is the red line. Daily RSI 76 = overbought + bearish divergence. BoJ on tightening path. Risk-on doesn't help yen but intervention overrides everything. R:R ~3:1 to 5:1.
watchlist.invalidation: If USDJPY breaks 160.50 cleanly (no intervention), cancel.

watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~1.3820 on bounce to resistance
watchlist.thesis: DXY weakness play (Conv 3). DXY 98.13, 7 straight down days. CAD PM Carney won majority (stability). Oil $88 still above pre-crisis ($75) = supportive for CAD. R:R ~1.5:1 to 2.5:1.

watchlist.cancel_reason: FAILED BREAKOUT. Price broke to 1.1834 with confirmed close, but then reversed -47 pips back to 1.1787 — below the 1.1811 breakout level. Classic fakeout. Retest rule saved us (did not enter at 1.1834). Breakout failed, do not trade.
watchlist.lesson: Retest discipline works. Not entering on the breakout candle saved ~47 pips of immediate loss.
watchlist.re_entry_conditions: Wait for new session structure. Valid re-entry: if EURUSD builds a new base above 1.1780 and makes another push above 1.1811 with fresh momentum — look for new setup Monday.
watchlist.thesis: CANCELLED. De-escalation + DXY weakness macro thesis intact, but today's breakout failed. Setup resets for Monday.

watchlist.invalidation_reason: WTI broke above $92.40 pivot (now $93.74) on Iran deal doubts + inventory draw. Pre-set invalidation rule triggered. Do NOT short here — thesis has reversed.
watchlist.monitor_for_re-entry: If Iran extension CONFIRMED and WTI drops back below $89, a new short setup may form. Do not chase.

Apr 27-28: BoJ policy meeting (hold at 0.75%, 82% odds — USDJPY short window Mon-Fri next week)

US mil blockade 'fully implemented.' Sticking points remain (nuclear, Hormuz, compensation). Trump says war 'very close to over.' Pakistan PM traveling to Saudi/Qatar/Turkey to mediate. No formal deal signed yet — treat as likely but unconfirmed. WTI $90.79. Gold $4,878.
market_context.dominant_theme: CEASEFIRE EXTENSION LIKELY. In-principle deal for 2-week extension exists as of Fri evening. AUDUSD long thesis at 0.7085 is the top priority Monday — if formal extension confirmed, enter on pullback. DXY weak. Gold ATH. BoJ no surprise this weekend. Risk-on bias strong going into Monday open.

trade_history.exit_reason: SL hit (trailing stop at breakeven). De-escalation regime shift killed Gold rally. Peak unrealized +$52.20 at $4,871.
SL hit (trailing stop at breakeven $90). WTI bounced from $87.79 back above $90. Peak unrealized +$1.74 at $88.20.
